name: Chocolate Matzo Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip a matzo in wine on both sides and place it on the serving dish.
2. Spread frosting/filling over the matzo.
3. Repeat steps 1 and 2, ending with a matzo layer.
4. Melt chocolate chips with margarine and water.
5. Frost the top and sides of the torte.
6. Decorate with chopped nuts.
7. Chill the torte until set.
